title: The Coated Sunny Descends
description: On pages 5–8, this part follows Unknown person #1, Rayleigh, Narrator, Marines, Brook, Franky, Luffy. The core story beat is the coated sunny descends.
scene: The scene centers on the coated sunny descends, with Unknown person #1, Rayleigh, Narrator, Marines, Brook, Franky, Luffy driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, I'm Roger!!!

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: This meeting must be fate, Rayleigh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What do you say to turning the world upside down with me?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the world?... hahahah! Who the hell are you, anyway? Get outta here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...it may just be that there is no such thing as coincidence in this world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As though it was always meant to be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Mysterious bonds slowly but surely weave their forms...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...at any rate... Luffy has taken another step...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...towards becoming a man...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...worthy of that hat he wears...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: that boy makes me feel...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...like living on for a while longer...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sea depths near the Sabaody archipelago

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The surface is so far away...!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: It's beautiful!! You can't get a window this big on a submarine, that's for sure!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're sinking!! Further further down!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is the water really not gonna get in?! It's kinda scary!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It feels as though we're leaving the human world behind... this is so exciting...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: W - We will be able to get back to the surface, right?! I mean...!! I - it's not as though I'm scared or anything, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The sea sure is pretty!!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Yohoho hoho! Take a look over to that side!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A tree!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No... it's a root!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right. The Sabaody archipelago is actually a forest of giant mangroves, after all...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The wonder of nature in all its glory!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've seen it already.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, when you got on the wrong ship!! SHUT UP!! We're trying to be awed here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Forget that - there's something behind us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These roots must reach all the way to the seabed... the sheer magnitude of it is impossible to put into words...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's something huge behind that tree!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Man, this is EXCIT-!!!!ing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A grand adventure in the ocean depths!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's like a dream!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ooh!! Fish!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I can almost reach them. Get here, you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There are some tasty- looking fish over here, too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Quit it, would you?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What're you gonna do if the bubble breaks?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll kill you, you assholes!!! Don't ever do that again!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Nami-san. Perhaps it would be best for you to explain the dangers of a coating ship..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...before these two do anything they will regret.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sure, Sanji- Kun!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I have a memo from Raleigh- San...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So listen up, everyone!! I'll explain...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They moved...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's a real live sexy girl!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sanji!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's gonna pop, it's gonna pop, it's gonna poppp!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Just how far is that nosebleed propelling him-?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whaa AAA?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sanji burst out into the seaa!!!

summary: The Coated Sunny Descends. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
